inputs.label: Process Mean
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic mean of the process measurements from the capability study.

businessContext_i18n.en: The arithmetic mean of the process measurements from the capability study.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yetenek çalışmasından alınan proses ölçümlerinin aritmetik ortalaması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das arithmetische Mittel der Prozessmessungen aus der Fähigkeitsstudie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne arithmétique des mesures du processus issues de l'étude de capabilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Media aritmética de las mediciones del proceso del estudio de capacidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المتوسط الحسابي لقياسات العملية من دراسة القدرة.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: The standard deviation (overall or within) of the process. Use long-term for Pp/Ppk; short-term for Cp/Cpk.

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard deviation (overall or within) of the process. Use long-term for Pp/Ppk; short-term for Cp/Cpk.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Prosesin (genel veya grup içi) standart sapması. Pp/Ppk için uzun vadeli; Cp/Cpk için kısa vadeli kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Standardabweichung (gesamt oder innerhalb) des Prozesses. Für Pp/Ppk langfristig, für Cp/Cpk kurzfristig verwenden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: L'écart type (global ou intra-série) du processus. Utilisez le long terme pour Pp/Ppk ; le court terme pour Cp/Cpk.
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación estándar (general o dentro) del proceso. Use a largo plazo para Pp/Ppk; a corto plazo para Cp/Cpk.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الانحراف المعياري (الكلي أو الداخلي) للعملية. استخدم طويل المدى لـ Pp/Ppk وقصير المدى لـ Cp/Cpk.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: The upper tolerance boundary; parts above this are defective.

businessContext_i18n.en: The upper tolerance boundary; parts above this are defective.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üst tolerans sınırı; bunun üzerindeki parçalar hatalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die obere Toleranzgrenze; Teile darüber sind fehlerhaft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La limite de tolérance supérieure ; les pièces au-dessus sont défectueuses.
businessContext_i18n.es: El límite de tolerancia superior; las piezas por encima de este son defectuosas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حد التسامح الأعلى؛ الأجزاء فوق هذا الحد تعتبر معيبة.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: The lower tolerance boundary; parts below this are defective.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lower tolerance boundary; parts below this are defective.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt tolerans sınırı; bunun altındaki parçalar hatalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die untere Toleranzgrenze; Teile darunter sind fehlerhaft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La limite de tolérance inférieure ; les pièces en dessous sont défectueuses.
businessContext_i18n.es: El límite de tolerancia inferior; las piezas por debajo de este son defectuosas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: حد التسامح الأدنى؛ الأجزاء تحت هذا الحد تعتبر معيبة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
